---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a concrete feature with clear goals and acceptance criteria.
---

**Title:** Short feature summary

**Problem statement:**

What gap exists today? Be specific and outcome-focused.

**Goal:**

The desired user-visible outcome.

**Proposed solution:**

Concise plan, API sketch, or implementation notes.

**Alternatives considered:**

Short notes on other approaches and why they were rejected.

**Backward compatibility / migration:**

Any breaking changes and how to handle them.

**Estimated effort:** small / medium / large

**Why this matters:**

Impact on performance, UX, maintainability, or security.

---
**Author:** Natalie Spiva <natalie@acreetionos.org>
